스팀페이지
← 스토리 목록으로

563D1D5B4DA1E26E8111AFA4EF6A8EC5, The Start of dodge Training

Main Story

563D1D5B4DA1E26E8111AFA4EF6A8EC5”, “The Start of dodge Training

퀘스트 배경

15F0C1D24261A56C7E7D0EB08766C043”, “Use the "About the Skill" keyword when speaking with Aria.

진행 상황

7BB4DE84447095BA0EE1B4B6317B452D”, “Sometimes you’ll find yourself surrounded by multiple enemies. D04684AE4F1F29F0E65F0CAD3EB4C4B4”, “That’s when Windmill becomes useful. DEAF4E82448A83A8CE3293A5971D7126”, “Talk to Vincent using the keyword “About the Skill” to be transported to the training room. E54476BB48F11BC69D0F4E8A85EB34A4”, “There, practice hitting 3 or more scarecrows at once.

완료

169A2EDC498441294683EE9958842DD8”, “You have learned the Evasion skill from Aria.
